CVE-2011-3821.title: xajax 0.6 beta1 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive infor ...
CVE-2011-3821.summary: xajax 0.6 beta1 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information via a direct request to a .php file, which reveals the installation path in an error message, as demonstrated by xajax_core/plugin_layer/xajaxScriptPlugin.inc.php and certain other files.
